sourcesContent:
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { ArrowRight, Layers, Zap, Brain } from 'lucide-react'; const VALUES=[ {Icon:Layers,title:'Synergy', desc:'We bring people, ideas and technology together to create stronger solutions that none could achieve alone.'}, {Icon:Zap, title:'Innovation',desc:'We constantly explore new ideas and technologies to build better, more impactful solutions for the future.'}, {Icon:Brain, title:'Intelligence',desc:'We use data, insight and strategic thinking to make smart, effective decisions at every stage of delivery.'}, ]; const PHIL=[ {n:'01',title:'Understand First', b:'Great software starts with great understanding. We invest time in knowing your business, users, and goals before a single line of code is written.'}, {n:'02',title:'Agile Architecture', b:'We combine agile iterative development with solid architecture — delivering working software quickly while ensuring the foundation scales.'}, {n:'03',title:'Modern Technology', b:'AI-driven automation, cloud architectures, CI/CD pipelines, and advanced analytics power everything we build.'}, {n:'04',title:'Ship with Confidence',b:'Build with purpose, test relentlessly, and ship with confidence. Every release is production-ready from day one.'}, ]; export default function About(){return(
{/* HERO */}
About Us

Driven by Code. Defined by Innovation.

A forward-thinking software company crafting digital experiences through clean code, sharp design, and relentless ambition.

{/* MISSION & VISION */}
Our Purpose

Mission & Vision

{[ {label:'Mission',title:'Engineering products that move the world forward.',body:"To empower businesses and creators with high-quality, scalable software — delivering full stack web platforms and game experiences that solve real problems and drive measurable growth.",img:'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1531482615713-2afd69097998?w=700&q=80'}, {label:'Vision', title:'A globally trusted technology partner.',body:'To become the go-to studio recognised for technical excellence, creative engineering, and a relentless commitment to building digital products that make a lasting impact.',img:'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1455849318743-b2233052fcff?w=700&q=80'}, ].map(({label,title,body,img})=>(
e.currentTarget.style.transform='scale(1.04)'} onMouseLeave={e=>e.currentTarget.style.transform='scale(1)'} />
{label}

{title}

{body}

))}
{/* VALUES */}
Core Values

What We Stand For

{VALUES.map(({Icon,title,desc})=>(
{e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow='var(--sh2)';e.currentTarget.style.transform='translateY(-4px)'}} onMouseLeave={e=>{e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow='none';e.currentTarget.style.transform='translateY(0)'}} >

{title}

{desc}

))}
{/* PHILOSOPHY */}
Our Philosophy

How We Think & Build

{PHIL.map(({n,title,b})=>(
{n}

{title}

{b}

))}
{/* TEAM CTA */}
Leadership

The Team Behind Synnoviq

Deep technical expertise combined with strategic business thinking — hands-on engineers who set the standard for quality on every engagement.

Meet the Team
);}
